use_cases: Display analytics metrics and data visualizations in dashboard interfaces
Showcase product features with animated visual summaries
Create interactive widget cards for SaaS applications
Present statistical data with engaging hover-triggered animations
Build multi-layered content cards for e-commerce product highlights
ai_summary: A multi-layered animated card component featuring an SVG donut chart, floating tech badges, and hover-triggered layer transitions. Built with composable sub-components including CardVisual, CardBody, CardTitle, and CardDescription. Supports dark mode and includes smooth animations for data visualization presentations in SaaS and dashboard applications.
